title: notelaea johnsonii
intro: Notelaea johnsonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae, commonly known as a mistletoe. Native to eastern Australia, this plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Notelaea johnsonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Notelaea johnsonii may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
